title: Python for AI: Zero to Project
modules: Why Python and Why Now: The AI Developer's On-Ramp
Python Basics That Actually Matter for AI Work
Working With Data: Files, APIs, and Inputs
Your First AI Integration: Calling a Model From Your Own Code
Building a Real Project: Design, Build, and Ship
Reading and Fixing AI-Generated Code Confidently
Sharing Your Work: GitHub, Portfolios, and Getting Noticed
What to Learn Next and How to Keep Momentum
synopsis: Python is the language of AI, and you don't need a CS degree to get started â you need the right path and a real project to finish. This course skips the filler and gets you to something you built yourself using Python and a live AI API.
rationale: Python remains the foundational skill for AI work, yet most intro courses don't connect Python basics to AI applications in ways that feel immediately relevant to young adults building portfolios or freelance skills.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can write Python scripts that interact with AI APIs and have a completed, shareable project that demonstrates real technical capability.
